LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: MATTER DISCUSSED. AT CONCLUSION OF DISCUSSION, THE COURT GRANTS (IN PART) DEFENDANT TRACIE JARRETT'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AS FOLLOWS: -THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE $240.28 HELD TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. -THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE $275.00 HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT. -THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO GARNISH $275.00 PER PAY PERIOD FOR PAYMENT OF DEBT. COURT TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: PAULA SHI #13358. *AFTER HEARING, THE COURT SIGNS ORDER DETERMINING CLAIM OF EXEMPTION (GRANTED IN PART).*

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption And Ntc Of Oppos
Off Calendar May-23-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Bass, Esq., 818.534.3109, for Plaintiff Persolve, LLC.
Tracie Jarrett, Defendant in propria persona.

RULING: MATTER DISCUSSED. AT CONCLUSION OF DISCUSSION, THE COURT GRANTS (IN PART) DEFENDANT TRACIE JARRETT'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AS FOLLOWS:
-THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE $240.28 HELD TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR.
-THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE $275.00 HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT.
-THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO GARNISH $275.00 PER PAY PERIOD FOR PAYMENT OF DEBT.
COURT TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Paula Shi #13358.
*AFTER HEARING, THE COURT SIGNS ORDER DETERMINING CLAIM OF EXEMPTION (GRANTED IN PART).*
